character.bio: ”The Soaring Eagle of the Desert” that fights using parkour. With the wind as his ally, he outfoxes opponents with his high mobility. Born into nobility, he's a carefree but earnest man. Loves video streaming.

vitals.hates: Fighting women and children,load times, trolls

rashid_standing_medium_kick_m.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

rashid_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponentForces a juggle state when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

rashid_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

rashid_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

rashid_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

rashid_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent on the 2nd attack

rashid_jumping_heavy_kick.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent when transitioning from Wing Stroke or Arabian Skyhigh

rashid_run.note: Movement can be stoppped from frames 2 - 60Can transition to either a branching attack or forward jump from frames 6 - 605 frames of recovery added when movement is stoppedCan be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 60

rashid_backup.note: Considered airborne from frames 1 - 17Only the second attack can be canceled into a Super Art

rashid_tempest_moon.context: (During Run) (Effect changes when in contact with air current)
rashid_tempest_moon.input: (During Run) (Effect changes when in contact with air current) → + K
rashid_tempest_moon.note: Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 15Considered airborne from frames 6 - 21Only the second attack can be canceled into a Super Art

rashid_air_current_boosted_tempest_moon.level: (from Run when coming in contact with an air current)
rashid_air_current_boosted_tempest_moon.context: (from Run when coming in contact with an air current)

rashid_flapping_spin_m.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent on the 1st attackCan be affected by air currents from frames 3 - 10

rashid_beak_assault_h.note: Can be affected by air currents from frames 4 - 25

rashid_crescent_kick_h.note: 3 frames of recovery added when the attack missesCan be affected by air currents from frames 6 - 19

rashid_blitz_strike.note: Can transition to a mid-air special move from frames 12 - 23 when the attack hits or is blockedCan transition to any mid-air normal attack or special move from frame 24 until landing on the groundProduces a ground bound when hitting a mid-air opponent

rashid_aerial_shot.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

rashid_side_flip.note: Can transition to Front Flip from frames 18 - 24Can be affected by air currents from frames 2 - 20

rashid_front_flip.note: Considered airborne from frames 11 - 43Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 22 - 40Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 36

rashid_l_whirlwind_shot_l.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↘→ + LK
rashid_l_whirlwind_shot_l.note: Transition to variation attack by releasing the button between frames 29 and 48Transition to maximum attack version by holding the button for over 48 frames

rashid_l_whirlwind_shot_longest_possible.displayName: L Whirlwind Shot(Longest possible button hold)
rashid_l_whirlwind_shot_longest_possible.note: After technique is finished, an air current that lasts 60 frames will be generated

rashid_wing_stroke.note: Considered airborne from frames 22 - 61Can transition to normal mid-air attacks from frames 32 - 51Can be affected by air currents from frames 23 - 47

rashid_rolling_assault.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 17 - 20Can be affected by air currents from frames 8 - 25

rashid_l_arabian_skyhigh.note: Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 13Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 51 until landing on the groundCan hit an opponent outside of a combo from frames 14 - 21

rashid_m_arabian_skyhigh.note: Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 18Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 59 until landing on the groundCan hit an opponent outside of a combo from frames 19 - 26

rashid_h_arabian_skyhigh.note: Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 21Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 62 until landing on the groundCan hit an opponent outside of a combo from frames 21 - 29

rashid_od_arabian_skyhigh.note: Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 13Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 51 until landing on the ground only when the attack is blocked or missesCan hit an opponent outside of a combo from frames 14 - 21

rashid_sa1_super_rashid_kick.note: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 16During the attack's active frames from frames 3 - 7 on hit, when the attack hits an airborne opponent, the properties change and damage is set to 1800Considered airborne from frames 10 - 36The minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

rashid_sa2_ysaar.note: An air current is generated during the attack's entire active frame duration and for 100 frames after the active frames are finishedYsaar becomes faster if Arabian Cyclone's first hit is collides with the attack during the active framesThe minimum guaranteed damage is 40%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

rashid_sa3_altair.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
rashid_sa3_altair.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
rashid_sa3_altair.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%.Note: Can only be canceled into from special moves.

rashid_ca_altair.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
rashid_ca_altair.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
rashid_ca_altair.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%.Note: Can only be canceled into from special moves.

rashid_riding_glider.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

rashid_sunset_drop.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

rashid_desert_slider.input: (During a jump) (When near opponent) LP + LK
rashid_desert_slider.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

rashid_forward_dash.note: Transitions to Run on frame 13Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 15

rashid_backward_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

rashid_drive_impact_eagle_edge.note: Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallProperties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, or after the Super Armor absorbs a hit:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

rashid_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
rashid_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
rashid_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

rashid_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

rashid_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
rashid_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
rashid_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

rashid_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

rashid_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

rashid_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

rashid_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
rashid_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
rashid_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
